title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails for triggers that use the table name with a different case
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME with case-sensitive trigger names
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TRIGGER TestTrigger AFTER INSERT ON TestTable BEGIN UPDATE TestTable SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = NEW.id;
ALTER TABLE TestTable RENAME TO testtable;
